added.dovin's veto: [[Dovin's Veto]] adds cheap, reliable protection and interaction for key noncreature spells.
added.indatha triome: [[Indatha Triome]] improves four-color fixing while covering three of the deck's core colors.

added.spara's headquarters: [[Spara's Headquarters]] improves access to Bant colors while entering as flexible fixing.
added.teferi's protection: [[Teferi's Protection]] is a powerful low-cost safeguard for your board and life total.
added.zagoth triome: [[Zagoth Triome]] expands reliable fixing for another key three-color combination in the deck.

removed.swamp: Extra [[Swamp]]s were cut to make room for stronger multicolor fixing.
removed.blue sun's zenith: [[Blue Sun's Zenith]] is mana-intensive and less efficient than the added utility.
removed.nicol bolas, dragon-god: [[Nicol Bolas, Dragon-God]] sits outside [[Atraxa, Praetors' Voice]]'s color identity.
removed.pull from tomorrow: [[Pull from Tomorrow]] was trimmed as a costly draw spell in favor of broader utility.
removed.stroke of genius: [[Stroke of Genius]] was cut because its heavy mana investment is clunky at casual pacing.

added.birds of paradise: [[Birds of Paradise]] is a one-mana fixer that accelerates [[Atraxa, Praetors' Voice]] and smooths four-color starts.
added.bloom tender: [[Bloom Tender]] provides efficient multicolor ramp that scales well in an [[Atraxa, Praetors' Voice]] deck.
added.contentious plan: [[Contentious Plan]] is a cheap proliferate spell that advances the deck while replacing itself.
added.drown in ichor: [[Drown in Ichor]] gives low-cost interaction while adding proliferate value.
added.fabled passage: [[Fabled Passage]] improves fixing with less tempo loss than slower basics-heavy draws.
added.felwar stone: [[Felwar Stone]] is efficient two-mana ramp that helps cast multicolor spells on time.
added.flooded strand: [[Flooded Strand]] improves color access and supports the upgraded mana base.
added.ichormoon gauntlet: [[Ichormoon Gauntlet]] adds strong proliferate payoff for the deck's planeswalkers and counters.
added.indatha triome: [[Indatha Triome]] fixes three colors at once and supports fetch land consistency.
added.marsh flats: [[Marsh Flats]] upgrades fixing by finding key dual-type lands in the manabase.
added.misty rainforest: [[Misty Rainforest]] improves early color selection and overall mana consistency.
added.noble hierarch: [[Noble Hierarch]] is cheap acceleration that helps power out early plays cleanly.
added.planewide celebration: [[Planewide Celebration]] offers flexible proliferate bursts that suit the deck's counter plan.
added.polluted delta: [[Polluted Delta]] strengthens fixing and makes the land base more efficient.
added.raffine's tower: [[Raffine's Tower]] provides strong three-color fixing with fetchable land types.
added.spara's headquarters: [[Spara's Headquarters]] improves Bant-color coverage while supporting fetch lands.
added.sword of truth and justice: [[Sword of Truth and Justice]] adds repeatable proliferate pressure on a useful equipment body.
added.verdant catacombs: [[Verdant Catacombs]] helps assemble the right colors faster in a four-color deck.
added.windswept heath: [[Windswept Heath]] increases mana reliability by finding key typed lands.
added.zagoth triome: [[Zagoth Triome]] adds broad fixing and works especially well with the new fetch package.

removed.forest: A second basic [[Forest]] was cut to reduce color strain in the mana base.
removed.island: A second basic [[Island]] was trimmed to support the upgraded fetch-triome package.
removed.plains: A second basic [[Plains]] was removed for denser fixing options.
removed.ajani, mentor of heroes: [[Ajani, Mentor of Heroes]] is slower at five mana than the tighter curve wants.
removed.blue sun's zenith: [[Blue Sun's Zenith]] is mana-hungry card draw that does not fit the lower curve plan.
removed.dovin baan: [[Dovin Baan]] is a modest-impact planeswalker that is easy to trim for efficiency.
removed.elspeth, sun's champion: [[Elspeth, Sun's Champion]] is powerful but expensive for a curve-tightening pass.
removed.evolving wilds: [[Evolving Wilds]] was replaced by faster and stronger mana fixing.
removed.karn liberated: [[Karn Liberated]] sits too high on the curve for this more streamlined build.
removed.kaya, orzhov usurper: [[Kaya, Orzhov Usurper]] is a narrower effect than the added ramp and fixing pieces.
removed.liliana vess: [[Liliana Vess]] is slow at five mana and was cut for cheaper support cards.
removed.nicol bolas, dragon-god: [[Nicol Bolas, Dragon-God]] was removed because it is outside [[Atraxa, Praetors' Voice]]'s color identity.
removed.nissa, who shakes the world: [[Nissa, Who Shakes the World]] is stronger in heavier-green mana bases than this one.
removed.pull from tomorrow: [[Pull from Tomorrow]] is another expensive draw spell that slows early development.
removed.rogue's passage: [[Rogue's Passage]] provides utility but hurts colored mana consistency.
removed.sorin, grim nemesis: [[Sorin, Grim Nemesis]] is a six-mana top-end card trimmed to lower the deck's average cost.
removed.stroke of genius: [[Stroke of Genius]] is inefficient in a build trying to spend mana earlier.
removed.swamp: A basic [[Swamp]] was cut for more flexible multicolor land options.
removed.terramorphic expanse: [[Terramorphic Expanse]] was removed in favor of higher-quality fixing.
removed.ugin, the spirit dragon: [[Ugin, the Spirit Dragon]] is a very expensive payoff that does not support the tighter curve.

raw.plan: This budget pass replaces several premium token payoffs, protection spells, and expensive lands with cheaper ramp, draw, and mana base fixes that still support [[Ghired, Conclave Exile]]. The goal is to keep the deck casual and functional while lowering cost and preserving token pressure through more affordable enablers like [[Beastmaster Ascension]] and [[Song of the Worldsoul]]. Extra basic lands also help stabilize the trimmed mana base after cutting multiple high-priced dual lands.

added.arid mesa: [[Arid Mesa]] improves color fixing and makes the mana base more consistent.

raw.summary: Transformed: Curve tightening. Power Casual, budget Moderate. Avg CMC ~2.73.
raw.plan: This pass lowers the deck’s curve so [[Teysa Karlov]] can deploy value pieces earlier and keep cards flowing through sacrifice loops. The adds focus on cheap draw, recursion, and token-sacrifice payoffs, while the cuts trim expensive finishers, slower interaction, and excess lands. The result is a faster casual list with more early plays and better turn-to-turn efficiency.

added.demonic tutor: [[Demonic Tutor]] gives the deck the cleanest possible access to key engines or answers.
added.diabolic intent: [[Diabolic Intent]] turns expendable creatures into an efficient tutor that fits the sacrifice plan.

added.enlightened tutor: [[Enlightened Tutor]] finds important enchantments or artifacts efficiently.
added.esper sentinel: [[Esper Sentinel]] provides early-game card advantage while developing the board.

added.grim haruspex: [[Grim Haruspex]] converts creature deaths into steady card draw.
added.imperial seal: [[Imperial Seal]] adds another cheap tutor to improve consistency.
added.liliana, dreadhorde general: [[Liliana, Dreadhorde General]] supplies token production, sacrifice pressure, and powerful draw from dying creatures.
added.marsh flats: [[Marsh Flats]] improves fixing and helps find the right colors on time.
added.midnight reaper: [[Midnight Reaper]] gives efficient card draw when your nontoken creatures die.
added.prismatic vista: [[Prismatic Vista]] improves mana consistency by turning into the basic color you need.
added.ranger-captain of eos: [[Ranger-Captain of Eos]] finds key one-drops and can silence opponents for a critical turn.

added.takenuma, abandoned mire: [[Takenuma, Abandoned Mire]] adds low-cost recursion from a land slot.
added.vanishing verse: [[Vanishing Verse]] is efficient exile-based removal in this color pair.
added.welcoming vampire: [[Welcoming Vampire]] adds repeatable card draw off the deck's smaller creatures and tokens.

removed.night's whisper: [[Night's Whisper]] was replaced by draw options with stronger synergy to creature gameplay.
removed.painful truths: [[Painful Truths]] is efficient draw, but the update favors more synergistic engines.
removed.phyrexian arena: [[Phyrexian Arena]] is slower than the added draw sources that impact the board sooner.

raw.summary: Transformed: Curve tightening. Power Casual, budget Moderate. Avg CMC ~2.86.
raw.plan: This pass lowers the deck’s effective curve and shifts more slots into cheap Elf payoffs, smoother card flow, and lands that provide stronger utility. Adding efficient tribal creatures like [[Dwynen's Elite]], [[Elvish Clancaller]], and [[Leaf-Crowned Visionary]] helps the deck commit to the board earlier. The cuts trim slower top-end, off-plan cards, and excess basics so the list stays leaner while still keeping strong rebuild tools like [[Patriarch's Bidding]] and [[Kindred Summons]].
raw.why: This pass lowers the deck’s effective curve and shifts more slots into cheap Elf payoffs, smoother card flow, and lands that provide stronger utility.
